title: olearia clemensiae
intro: Olearia clemensiae, also known as Clemens' daisy or mountain daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to the mountainous regions of New South Wales and Victoria in Australia. Olearia clemensiae has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for traditional and modern uses.
